diagrams.title: Data Storage Units Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical relationship between storage units from bit to Yottabyte
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the 1024× multiplication factor between each unit in binary system

diagrams.title: Throughput vs Latency Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparing throughput (data volume over time) and latency (delay from request to response)
elements: Throughput = data size / time to transfer
diagrams.purpose: Understand the difference between speed (throughput) and delay (latency) in capacity planning

diagrams.title: Network Capacity Metrics
diagrams.description: Shows different network capacity measurements and their typical applications
diagrams.purpose: Choose appropriate capacity units for different network scenarios
